description: Frozen OmniPath interactions pull enriching the NB6 GRN edges (MITF/SOX10/PAX3 as source_genesymbol) with the 'dorothea_level' field (DoRothEA A-E confidence tier), which is NOT present in the base omnipath_internal.json frozen for NB2. Consumed offline by NB6 Step 2 to assign per-edge confidence tiers.
